title: Verilator Compilation Failure When Importing getenv via DPI-C
body:
When I import `getenv` through DPI-C, the Verilator compilation will fail with the following error message.
```
./Vtest___024root__DepSet_h5a85c7f7__0.cpp:9:24: error: functions that differ only in their return type cannot be overloaded
extern "C" const char* getenv(const char* name);
                 ~~~~~ ^
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/include/stdlib.h:147:7: note: previous declaration is here
char    *getenv(const char *);
~~~~~~~~~^
In file included from Vtest__ALL.cpp:7:
In file included from ./Vtest__Dpi.cpp:14:
./Vtest__Dpi.h:20:24: error: functions that differ only in their return type cannot be overloaded
    extern const char* getenv(const char* name);
                 ~~~~~ ^
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/include/stdlib.h:147:7: note: previous declaration is here
char    *getenv(const char *);
~~~~~~~~~^
```

- Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)

```SystemVerilog
// test.sv
module test ();
    import "DPI-C" function string getenv(input string name);
    initial begin
        $display("Hello world");
    end
endmodule
```

- What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

verilator --binary test.sv

- What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

Verilator 5.028 2024-08-21 rev UNKNOWN.REV

- What OS and distribution are you using?

macOS  Sonoma 14.6.1, ubuntu 22.04
